overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long OKTA Daily ETF (OKTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Okta, Inc. (NASDAQ: OKTA) stock, less fees, and expenses OKTG was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
